subcodes.first_line: O Javad! Hearken thou unto My call time and again. By the life of God! At every moment it hath an influence whereof none is aware save God alone [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا جواد ان استمع ندائی مره بعد مره لعمر الله ان له فیکل حین اثر ما اطلع به الا الله
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
